# MinimalBlockInfo

Lightweight block summary containing only the most commonly needed fields.

## Import

```ts
import { MinimalBlockInfo } from 'casper-js-sdk';
```

## Class

### `MinimalBlockInfo`

| Property | Type | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `creator` | `PublicKey` | Public key of the validator that proposed this block (called `"creator"` in this summary type; `"proposer"` in the full `Block` header) |
| `eraID` | `number` | Era this block belongs to |
| `hash` | `Hash` | Block hash |
| `height` | `number` | Block height |
| `stateRootHash` | `Hash` | State root hash |
| `timestamp` | `Timestamp` | Block creation timestamp |

## Usage

```ts
// MinimalBlockInfo typically appears in RPC responses like getEraSummary
const { eraSummary } = await client.getEraSummaryLatest();

// Block info is also embedded in various RPC responses
const blockInfo: MinimalBlockInfo = /* from RPC response */;
console.log('Height:', blockInfo.height);
console.log('Hash:', blockInfo.hash.toHex());
console.log('Creator:', blockInfo.creator.toHex());
```

## See Also

- [`Block`](/types/block) - Full block with transactions and proofs
- [`EraSummary`](/types/era-summary) - Contains minimal block context
